projects.name: TypeSim
projects.desc: ai-powered python tool simulating human typing patterns to bypass typing detectors.

projects.name: Messenger Unleashed
projects.desc: supercharged messenger client with read receipt blocking, 17+ themes, and power-user tools.

modal.title: messenger_desktop_case
modal.content: Electron shell wrapping a React renderer: theme packs, read-receipt suppression, and hotkeys for power users — shipping as a daily-driver client, not a toy UI mock.

casefile.problem: Official messengers optimize for engagement, not user agency. Read receipts, noisy chrome, and weak extensibility made daily use feel adversarial.
casefile.constraints: Electron bundle size, OS notifications, and safe auto-update channels; must feel native on Windows with tolerable memory use.
failedAttempts: CSS-only theme injection breaking on vendor DOM updates
Patching binaries instead of stable renderer-level hooks
casefile.breakthrough: Stabilized an extension surface in the renderer with versioned theme manifests and guarded IPC so UI experiments cannot brick the shell.
casefile.outcome: A client people launch every day: 17+ curated themes, blocked receipts, and fast keyboard-first workflows.

timeline.title: Shell + preload contract
timeline.detail: Locked IPC boundary before touching UI flourishes.

timeline.title: Theme compiler
timeline.detail: Token map + contrast guards so community skins stay legible.

timeline.title: Public beta
timeline.detail: Installer + auto-update smoke tests on real hardware.

projects.name: Stock Management
projects.desc: specialized inventory system for zielarz vape shop with real-time sync and dynamic pricing.

modal.title: zielarz_inventory_core
modal.content:
custom-built inventory management for zielarz, a local vape shop in częstochowa. designed to handle specific domain requirements like liquid strengths (6/12/18mg), longfills, and salts that generic pos systems couldn't support.

powered by convex for real-time updates across multiple screens. includes a customer-facing TV display for live menu availability, a drag-and-drop admin interface, qr code generation, and a complete audit log. it's not just a database; it's the nervous system of the shop.

casefile.problem: Retail POS templates could not express nicotine strengths, longfills vs shortfills, or salts without corrupting stock counts — staff were reconciling spreadsheets after close.
casefile.constraints: Real-time floor + TV + back office; must work on uneven Wi‑Fi; audit trail for every price or quantity change; polish UI for non-technical operators.
failedAttempts: Spreadsheet + barcode scanner (human error on variants)
Off-the-shelf inventory SaaS without variant algebra
casefile.breakthrough: Modeled inventory as variant SKUs with Convex subscriptions so TV, counter, and admin always share one optimistic-then-consistent truth.
casefile.outcome: Same-day stock truth on the sales floor, fewer write-offs, and a TV menu that hides SKUs the moment counts hit zero.

timeline.title: Variant matrix interview
timeline.detail: Mapped how staff thinks in mg strengths, not generic product rows.

timeline.title: TV + counter split
timeline.detail: Read-heavy public query vs authenticated mutations with role checks.

timeline.title: Audit log + QR
timeline.detail: Every adjustment traceable; shelf labels generated from live data.

evidence.label: Domain: liquid strengths
evidence.detail: 6 / 12 / 18 mg + salts encoded as first-class fields

projects.name: Oddech / Re4matik
projects.desc: dual-brand next.js + convex platform: course catalog, stripe checkout, workos auth, refine admin, resend, botid, sentry — polish-first marketing and learning.

modal.title: multi_brand_breathwork_platform
modal.content:
one deployment for odrodzenie oddechowe and re4matik: middleware and proxy map hosts to brand-scoped routes; convex schema and queries filter by brand. public marketing, workshops, faq, contact with validation and bot protection; course purchase flow and authenticated learn area with lessons and media.

admin: refine for pages, services, workshops, testimonials, pricing, contacts, specialists, manual course access, seeds/migrations. integrations: stripe webhooks, workos authkit + membership sync into convex via signed api routes. quality: typescript strict, vitest, playwright (including csv-driven e2e), eslint with convex rules, csp and hardening (course visibility, webhooks, auth callback allowlist, lesson html sanitization).

live: odrodzenieoddechowe.pl; re4matik production is re4matik.pl with re4matik.pcstyle.dev used for preview/e2e per infra — repo pc-style/oddech (private).

casefile.problem: Two brands needed separate marketing and course catalogs without duplicating deployments, auth, or Stripe logic — any drift between brands would double incident surface.
casefile.constraints: Host-based routing, brand-scoped Convex data, WorkOS + Stripe correctness, CSP and webhook hardening, Polish-first content workflows for non-dev editors.
failedAttempts: Separate Vercel projects per brand (auth + billing divergence)
Single UI theme with runtime toggles (SEO + routing leaks)
casefile.breakthrough: Middleware maps host → brand key; Convex functions always take brand scope; Refine admin shares one schema with row-level brand filters.
casefile.outcome: One pipeline ships both brands: purchases unlock the right learn space, admins edit without touching code, and Playwright locks critical flows.

timeline.title: Host → brand map
timeline.detail: Middleware + typed brand enum end to end.

timeline.title: Stripe + Convex entitlements
timeline.detail: Webhooks idempotent; course visibility derived from purchase state.

timeline.title: CSV-driven e2e
timeline.detail: Playwright scenarios cover contact, checkout, and lesson access.
